releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

- Cut both crons to every 4 hours, cache build-forge-sync
- Load MSVC env via temp .bat to avoid cmd nested-quote bug
- Probe each VS install for vcvarsall.bat instead of trusting vswhere
- Replace dtolnay/rust-toolchain with direct rustup via pwsh
- Probe multiple rustup locations + dump diagnostics on miss
- Self-install rustup if not found locally
- Diag: dump bin/artifacts subdirectories when stage script can't find net48 output
- Suppress Platform=x64 from vcvars env to fix dotnet output path
- Retry Install path that force-closes Revit before retrying

_(+ 4 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Forge Tools improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
